info.title: Sovrium API
info.description:
REST API specification for Sovrium application.

**Generated Schema**: This schema is automatically generated from the runtime implementation. It reflects the currently implemented endpoints and their schemas.

**Design Specs**: Hand-written OpenAPI specs in `docs/specifications/app/` define the complete API design. Comparing this generated schema with the design specs shows implementation progress.

tags.name: records
tags.description: Record CRUD, comments, and history endpoints

tags.name: views
tags.description: View management and filtered record access

tags.name: activity
tags.description: Activity log and audit trail endpoints

fields.description: User-defined field values (may include display formatting)

updatedBy.description: User who last updated the record

ActivityLogDetail.description: Single activity log entry with change details

userId.description: User ID this session belongs to

post.description: Sign in with a social provider

callbackURL.description: Callback URL to redirect to after the user has signed in

errorCallbackURL.description: Callback URL to redirect to if an error happens

disableRedirect.description: Disable automatic redirection to the provider. Useful for handling the redirection yourself

nonce.description: Nonce used to generate the token

scopes.description: Array of scopes to request from the provider. This will override the default scopes passed.

requestSignUp.description: Explicitly request sign-up. Useful when disableImplicitSignUp is true for this provider

loginHint.description: The login hint to use for the authorization code request

200.description: Success - Returns either session details or redirect URL

schema.description: Session response when idToken is provided

400.description: Bad Request. Usually due to missing parameters, or invalid parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Due to missing or invalid authentication.

403.description: Forbidden. You do not have permission to access this resource or to perform this action.

404.description: Not Found. The requested resource was not found.

429.description: Too Many Requests. You have exceeded the rate limit. Try again later.

500.description: Internal Server Error. This is a problem with the server that you cannot fix.

get.description: Returns server health status. Used by monitoring tools and E2E tests to verify server is running.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the health check

get.description: Returns a list of all tables with summary information.
Returns full table definition including fields, views, and permissions.
Returns the current user's permissions for the table, including field-level access.
Returns paginated records for a table with optional sorting and filtering.

post.description: Creates a new record in the table with the given field values.

updatedBy.description: User who last updated the record

400.description: Validation error

get.description: Returns a single record by ID with all field values.

fields.description: User-defined field values (may include display formatting)

updatedBy.description: User who last updated the record

patch.description: Updates field values of an existing record.

400.description: Validation error

delete.description: Soft-deletes a record. Use the restore endpoint to undo.

post.description: Restores a soft-deleted record back to active state.

get.description: Returns paginated list of soft-deleted records in the trash.
Returns the audit trail of changes for a specific record.
Returns paginated comments for a specific record.

post.description: Adds a comment to a record.

400.description: Validation error

get.description: Returns a single comment by ID.

patch.description: Updates the content of a comment. Only the author can update.

400.description: Validation error

403.description: Forbidden

delete.description: Soft-deletes a comment. Only the author or admin can delete.

403.description: Forbidden

post.description: Creates multiple records in a single request (up to 1000).

400.description: Validation error

patch.description: Updates multiple records in a single request (up to 100).

400.description: Validation error

delete.description: Soft-deletes multiple records in a single request (up to 100).

400.description: Validation error

post.description: Restores multiple soft-deleted records in a single request (up to 100).

400.description: Validation error

post.description: Creates or updates records based on merge fields. Existing records matching the merge fields are updated; new records are created.

400.description: Validation error

get.description: Returns all views defined for a table.
Returns view configuration including filters, sorts, and visible fields.

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default view

get.description: Returns records filtered and sorted according to the view configuration.
Returns paginated activity logs with optional filtering by table or action type.
Returns a single activity log entry with full change details.

post.description: Records a page view event. Uses single-letter keys to minimize payload size.

400.description: Validation error

get.description: Returns summary statistics and time series data for the given date range.

400.description: Invalid date range

get.description: Returns most visited pages with view counts and unique visitors.
Returns traffic sources ranked by page views.

pageViews.description: Total page views from this referrer

get.description: Returns visitor breakdown by device type, browser, and operating system.
Returns UTM campaign performance data.
Returns the current user session and user data.
Returns paginated list of all users with role information. Requires admin role.

403.description: Not authorized (admin required)

get.description: Returns detailed user information including role and ban status.

post.description: Creates a new user account. Password must be 8-128 characters.

400.description: Validation error

post.description: Updates user details including name, email, and role.
Permanently deletes a user account.
Bans a user with an optional reason and expiration.
Removes ban from a user account.
Changes a user role to admin or user.
